name: Smith & Nephew plc
description: Smith+Nephew is a portfolio medical technology company focused on the repair, regeneration, and replacement of soft and hard tissue. The company operates through three global business units: Orthopaedics, Sports Medicine & ENT, and Advanced Wound Management. By leveraging innovative technologies, Smith+Nephew aims to restore patients' physical health and self-belief, helping them overcome limitations caused by injury or disease. With a commitment to care, courage, and collaboration, the company provides advanced solutions for surgical procedures and wound care, striving to improve clinical outcomes and quality of life for patients worldwide under the purpose of 'Life Unlimited.'
